problems: Major duplicated roof ice-cream cone signs; concept has one cone sign but model reconstructed multiple separate cones.
Front/side consistency is off, with the roof sign placement and silhouette not matching the turnaround.
Roof shape is blobby and softened compared with the clean faceted low-poly concept.
Awning scallops and small front details are simplified and less color-accurate than the concept.
Textures are present but somewhat washed and less crisp.
notes: Coherent kiosk body, but duplicated roof cones indicate a significant multiview reconstruction failure.
